hero.title: Hello, I'm Therese!
hero.text: I'm a Front-End Developer passionate about creating intuitive, user-friendly web experiences. I combine creativity, problem-solving, and modern technologies to turn ideas into practical digital solutions.

about.title: About
about.text: Skilled in React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Passionate about building responsive, user-friendly web applications with clean code and thoughtful design.

petsApp.title: Pets App
petsApp.description: A full-stack pet management application for tracking health records, vaccinations, and daily pet care. Built with React, TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.

restaurant.title: Restaurant Website
restaurant.description: A responsive restaurant website built with HTML and CSS, focusing on clean design, usability, and an enjoyable experience on both desktop and mobile devices.

gaming.title: Gaming Website
gaming.description: A responsive gaming website built with HTML and CSS, focusing on visual design, layout structure, and an engaging user experience.

weatherApp.title: Weather App
weatherApp.description: A responsive weather application that uses an external API to display current weather conditions and a five-day forecast. Built with JavaScript and REST API.

movieAppJavascript.title: Movie App (Javascript)
movieAppJavascript.description: A responsive movie application built with JavaScript that integrates a movie API to display movie information and search results.

movieAppReact.title: Movie App (React & Typescript)
movieAppReact.description: A responsive movie application built with React and TypeScript, featuring movie search, detailed movie information, and the ability to save favorite movies.
